positive.text: Scope compliance: Appropriate inclusion of Parts 1-3 for the Adult dataset and Part 1 for the Wine dataset.
Fixed splits and leakage-safe preprocessing: Reported Train/Test/Val split where Preprocessing is reserved to Train only.
Compute accounting is explicit and comparable: Gradient evals are reported, as are Fevals for RO and Wall Clock Time.
Seed protocol and stability reporting is credible: Sufficient random seeds are tested and result dispersion/distribution is well documented.
Reproducibility instructions are sufficient: Environment setup, commands and fixed seeds are acknowledged.

negative.text: Scope compliance for Adult and Wine datasets was required.
Expected Train/Test/Val split with preprocessing restricted to Train.
Compute accounting should report gradient evals, Fevals, and wall clock time.
Seed protocol and stability reporting should include multiple seeds and distribution reporting.
Reproducibility instructions should include environment setup, commands, and fixed seeds.

positive.text: Single hypothesis with SL Report comparison and theory-grounded expectations.
EDA comparison with SL Report baseline and discussion of differences.

negative.text: Expected a single testable hypothesis grounded in theory with SL Report comparison.
Expected comparison between this report’s EDA and the SL Report baseline.

positive.text: Correct RO scope with last 1-3 layers unfrozen and parameter cap disclosed.
RO objective defined as validation loss and evaluated deterministically.
Complete operator disclosures for RHC, SA, and GA including policies and perturbation settings.
RO progress curves and budget-matched comparisons provided.
Dataset comparison interpretation provided.

negative.text: Expected only last 1-3 layers unfrozen and parameter cap disclosed.
RO objective should be validation loss with deterministic evaluation using model.eval().
Expected full operator disclosure for RHC, SA, and GA including policies and perturbations.
Expected progress curves (best-so-far vs fevals) with budget comparisons.
Expected dataset-dependent interpretation.

positive.text: All 7 optimizers implemented on Adult dataset with hyperparameters and budgets.
Time/steps to threshold defined and used consistently.
Sensitivity heatmaps provided with fair budget comparisons.
Seed stability demonstrated with distribution statistics.
Generalization gap computed and interpreted.

negative.text: Expected all 7 optimizers implemented with declared hyperparameters and budgets.
Expected defined validation-loss threshold and reporting of time or steps to reach it.
Expected hyperparameter sensitivity heatmaps with interpretation.
Expected seed stability reporting with statistics like median and IQR.
Expected computation and interpretation of the generalization gap.

positive.text: Adam hyperparameters inherited from best Part 2 results.
All four regularizers tested with reported values and placement.
Budget-matched comparison between baseline and regularized models.
Interpretation comparing Part 2 and Part 3 results.

negative.text: Adam hyperparameters should be inherited from best Part 2 configuration.
Expected testing and reporting of all four regularizers.
Expected budget-matched comparison with seed protocol.
Expected interpretation comparing optimizer ablation vs regularization.

positive.text: Hypothesis revisited and resolved using evidence.
Practical rule provided for choosing optimization vs regularization strategies.

negative.text: Expected explicit conclusion on hypothesis supported by results.
Expected a practical rule for prioritizing optimizer changes vs regularization vs RO tuning.

positive.text: Visualizations used to support interpretation rather than summary.
External peer-reviewed references included.
AI use disclosure provided.

negative.text: Expected visualizations to directly support reasoning about optimization behavior.
Expected at least two peer-reviewed references.
Expected AI disclosure statement.

positive.text: Integrated run using best Adam, regularizer, and RO method.
At least three integrated runs across seeds.
Integrated runs with compute tradeoff discussion.
